prompt: In Mail, add a sender to the VIP list. Use the sender of any visible Inbox message — click the sender name > 'Add to VIPs' (or Message menu > Add Sender to VIPs). After acting, also write the sender's email address (or 'vip-added' if you don't have a real sender) to ~/Desktop/kinbench/132-vip-confirm.txt — this is the eval's paper trail because the VIP plist (~/Library/Mail/V*/MailData/VIPs.plist) is TCC-protected.
